title: Affirmative Employment Program | OEEO | CDC
text:
ruitment, placement and retaining of qualified individuals who are typically underrepresented in the workplace. Managers and supervisors are required to not only develop strategies to complete these activities, but to also actively remove any barriers to entry.
October 1, 2024
